name: parse-search-results
description: Parses one New World shop-search results page into structured product-card data, or a structured parse error when the document contains no recognizable search-results structure at all

html.description: The full decoded HTML text of the captured page (components receive pure data, never file paths)

source-url.description: The URL the page was fetched from; relative links resolve against it

returns.description: The result envelope for the WIT `result<search-results, parse-error>` return (see common/README.md): exactly one of an ok branch carrying the parsed search results or an err branch carrying the structured parse error
